summary: Iteration 113 - Export Features and Responsive CSS Testing Complete. All features verified: (1) PDF preview loads on mobile with responsive CSS, (2) Word export returns HTTP 200 with 43KB file, (3) PDF export returns HTTP 200 with 18KB file, (4) Full Report Page loads with proper styling, (5) DocumentPreviewPage iframe auto-sizes to content height (7961px, not fixed 78vh), (6) Chat endpoint GET /api/cases/{caseId}/messages returns 200, (7) Backend health check returns healthy, (8) ReportView export HTML contains @media (max-width: 768px) responsive styles, (9) BarristerView export HTML contains @media (max-width: 768px) responsive styles.

backend_tests.get_messages: PASS - GET /api/cases/{caseId}/messages returns 200 with messages array
backend_tests.word_export: PASS - GET /api/cases/{caseId}/reports/{reportId}/export-docx returns 200, file size: 43073 bytes
backend_tests.pdf_export: PASS - GET /api/cases/{caseId}/reports/{reportId}/export-pdf returns 200, file size: 18225 bytes

frontend_tests.report_view_loads: PASS - Full Report Page loads with proper styling on mobile viewport (430x932)
frontend_tests.export_buttons_visible: PASS - All 3 export buttons visible (Print, Export Word, Export PDF)
frontend_tests.pdf_preview_navigation: PASS - Export PDF button navigates to /document-preview?mode=pdf
frontend_tests.pdf_preview_responsive: PASS - PDF preview shows styled cover page with responsive fonts, case info grid, table of contents
frontend_tests.iframe_auto_resize: PASS - DocumentPreviewPage iframe auto-sizes to content height (7961px, not fixed 78vh)
frontend_tests.report_header_styling: PASS - Report colour header found with proper styling
frontend_tests.table_of_contents: PASS - Report table of contents found with 8 sections
frontend_tests.report_sections: PASS - Report sections found and properly rendered

code_review.reportview_responsive_css: PASS - ReportView.jsx lines 762-789 contain @media (max-width: 768px) responsive styles
code_review.barristerview_responsive_css: PASS - BarristerView.jsx lines 390-406 contain @media (max-width: 768px) responsive styles

context_for_next_testing_agent: All export features verified in iteration 113. PDF preview shows responsive CSS on mobile viewport. Iframe auto-resizes to content height (7961px). Word export returns 43KB file, PDF export returns 18KB file. Case ID for testing: case_e7a5b5faf51e, Report ID: rpt_66f34314b465. ReportView.jsx and BarristerView.jsx both contain @media (max-width: 768px) responsive styles for mobile PDF preview.
